title: neottia smithii
intro: Neottia smithii, also known as the Chinese orchid or Chinese ladies' tresses, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Neottia smithii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Neottia smithii is often used in tea or capsule form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
